title: JUMP-2324 Supervised by "Association of Bullying Victims" Behind-the-scenes Leaked Video National Elementary School "Rules of Bullying"
overview: Bullying among students has become a social problem in the past as well as today, but what is being reported in the news is just the tip of the iceberg. almost unreported. And I was surprised to hear that some girls who became famous as child actors were also victims of bullying out of jealousy. The video that was filming such a gruesome scene was obtained from the assailant in absolute secrecy. This is the reality of modern children.
